title: Extreme Weather Shelters - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SEVERE WEATHER DESCHUTES COUNTY DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH SEVERE WEATHER SHELTER LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on warming centers during a severe weather event. May offer additional warming resources. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Warming centers operate during the winter months and during severe weather advisories. Locations are open either throughout the winter season or when temperature thresholds are met. Email (541) 322-7400 Visit Website More Details COOLING CENTERS DESCHUTES COUNTY THE LIGHTHOUSE NAVIGATION CENTER OVERNIGHT COOLING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offering overnight shelter throughout the summer season. 275 NE 2nd Street Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 318-0729 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER DESCHUTES COUNTY REDMOND WINTER SHELTER BY SHEPHERD'S HOUSE MINISTRIES OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offering overnight shelter throughout the winter season. A meal is served each night. To-go bags are given out each morning. 1350 South Highway 97 Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older, families with minor children, and well behaved pets Hours: 7 days per week 6pm-7am Email (541) 388-2096 Get Directions Visit Website More Details The following 1 providers match your search parameters but are outside of your search radius. SEVERE WEATHER DESCHUTES COUNTY LA PINE WARMING SHELTER BY THE DOOR AT LA PINE OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offering overnight shelter throughout the winter season. 16430 3rd Street La Pine, OR 97739 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and families with children. Well behaved pets are welcome; pets must remain with owner. Hours: 7 days per week 5pm-7am, Monday, December 1, 2025-Sunday, March 15, 2026 -Meals served from 6pm-7pm Email (541) 948-6649 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COOLING CENTERS DESCHUTES COUNTY OVERNIGHT COOLING SHELTER SEVERE WEATHER DESCHUTES COUNTY OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER SEVERE WEATHER DESCHUTES COUNTY OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER
